title: Implement push and pop
prompt: Implement push (allocate a node, link it in front of *top, make it the new top) and pop (remove the front node, return its value, free the node - with no leaks and no use-after-free). main already pushes 1 through 5, then pops and prints every value until the stack is empty. Expected output: 5, 4, 3, 2, 1, each on its own line.
